## 4. Acknowledgments (Agent)

By signing below, the Agent acknowledges:
- (a) receipt and understanding of Mi Casa Real Estate's Internal Agent Governance Pack;
- (b) completion of required compliance training (AML/KYC, data protection);
- (c) agreement to comply with applicable regulations and company policies; and
- (d) that regulatory registration must be renewed before expiry to continue operating.
